rootCause: Both workflow files used actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-node@v4, and pnpm/action-setup@v4.
Those upstream action tags still declare runs.using: node20, so GitHub warns even though the jobs themselves run Node 22.
No local actions or reusable workflows were present beyond .github/workflows/ci.yml and .github/workflows/release.yml.
changes: Updated actions/checkout from v4 to v5 in CI and Release workflows.
Updated pnpm/action-setup from v4 to v5 in CI and Release workflows.
Updated actions/setup-node from v4 to v5 in CI and Release workflows.

checks.name: deprecated-reference-scan
checks.detail: No tracked repo files matched actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-node@v4, pnpm/action-setup@v4, or runs.using: node20 after the update.

checks.name: diff-check
checks.detail: git diff --check was clean for the touched workflow and proof files.
